title: Netanyahu Ad Uses a Questionable Tactic Against Bereaved Rival
summary_full: A.I.-generated images showing Gadi Eisenkot, the Israeli leader’s top challenger in upcoming elections, played on anti-Arab sentiments and used images seen as disrespectful to his son, who was killed in the recent Gaza war.
